coscaling_obstruction: For TG_(m,t), root-excluded bumps sit near 3mt+O(m), while the mean is 2mt+O(m) and variance is O(mt). Adding Q nested leaves shifts mode and bumps together; Q=O(mt) leaves the bump Theta(sqrt(mt)) standard deviations into the tail, while Q comparable to or above (mt)^2 enters the binomial-smoothing regime. The evolutionary pivot found real selected-state bumps but no ratio crossing.
fixed_library_obstruction: For bounded hard species/counts and min(s_i)->infinity, U=empty dominates the central window exponentially. With separation h=5, the fixed-core ratio expansion has reserve (C+16)/Q+O(Q^-2), C in [4,8), so the grammar is eventually noncrossing.
nested_phase_expansion: I=sum_U (1+x)^(Q-sum_(i in U)s_i) A_U(x); U indexes selected plateau centers and Q=sum_i s_i
next_mechanism_requirement: Any further negative grammar must supply broad variance without either a 2^(-d) root-weight loss or an extensive binomial convolution, and must place a selected-state slope bump within O(standard deviation) of its first descent.
